mapper.select: SELECT * FROM column_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) ORDER BY column_name ASC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM column_info WHERE datasource_id = #{query.datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{query.tableName})
AND LOWER(column_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query.keyword}), '%')
ORDER BY column_name DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY column_name ASC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM column_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) AND LOWER(column_name) = LOWER(#{columnName}) ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
